notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead plunked
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead hit by pitch. Joey Wiemer scores. Nasim Nuñez to 3rd. James Wood to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brady House grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Brady House hits a grand slam (4) to left center field. Nasim Nuñez scores. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead scores.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Curtis Mead. Juan Soto to 3rd. MJ Melendez out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Curtis Mead. Juan Soto to 3rd. MJ Melendez out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Slater pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Slater flies out to right fielder Joey Wiemer.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens grounds out, second baseman José Tena to first baseman Curtis Mead.
